case_title: CACH, LLC VS. CHALON N PALMER et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, CHALON N AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGMENT DEBTOR CHALON PALMER'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. THE SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE IS ORDERED TO RELEASE THE $396.17 IN FUNDS IT IS CURRENTLY HOLDING TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR TOWARDS SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT. $125.00 IS ORDERED TO BE WITHHELD FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS PER PAY PERIOD UNTIL THE DEBT IS SATISFIED. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
Claim Of Expemption; Notice Of Non-Oppos
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PETER LIEDERMAN, ESQ., 510.681.6916, FOR PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC.
CHALON PALMER, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER.

RULING: matter discussed. The Court modified its tentative ruling. Judgment Debtor Chalon Palmer's claim of exemption is granted. The San Francisco County Sheriff's Office is ordered to release the $396.17 in funds it is currently holding to Judgment Creditor towards satisfaction of the judgment. $125.00 is ordered to be withheld from Debtor's earnings per pay period until the debt is satisfied. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
